title: koeleria gracilis var. mukdenensis
intro: Koeleria gracilis var. mukdenensis is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of sweet grass or timothy grass. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Koeleria gracilis var. mukdenensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
